phase-summary.outcome: Chat operations can now trigger bundle serialization through `/api/content-packs/build-bundle`, including canonical content bindings, with build results surfaced in Space Explorer and optional bundle/manifest download.

file.description: Added `build_bundle` operation support with validation gate and artifact generation/download path.
Declared `build_bundle` in allowed operation contract for Codex responses.

tests.test: Typecheck passes for chat-driven bundle serialization wiring.

suggestion.gap: Current requirements do not enforce chat-generated bundle artifact verification.
suggestion.proposal: Add requirement: chat-driven serialization must validate schema and emit bundle + manifest artifacts before release sign-off.

next.action: Execute 50-12 end-to-end QA checks in Space Explorer and record release readiness.
